artifact_purpose: Public, non-secret proof that the hosted run exposed Phoenix/OpenTelemetry, Phoenix MCP, eval, and improvement receipts.
trace_id_note: The public proof endpoint exposes TraceGuard's run_id and Phoenix MCP read-query status. It does not expose a Phoenix UI trace ID, Phoenix API key, cookies, or Secret Manager output.
gemini_provider: Google Cloud Gemini on Vertex AI
claim_boundary: TraceGuard reports live Gemini, Phoenix, and MCP only when the runtime result confirms those states. The improvement loop recommends a next-run change; it does not claim autonomous production self-modification.
